titleStmt.title: SII 23.74: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 74. (A.R. No. 74 of 1907.) Ambāsamudram, Ambasamudram Taluk, Tirunelveli District Tirumūlanāthasvāmi temple—on the west wall of the central shrine Rājēndra-Chōḷa I: year 8: 1019-20 A.D.

summary.p: This records a gift of 50 sheep by one Kaṇṇaṉ Rājarājaṉ a merchant of [Ā]lattūr in Śōṇādu (Chōḷa-nāḍu) for burning a perpetual lamp in the temple of Tiruchchālatturai-Āḻvār at Iḷaṅgōkkuḍi a quarter of Rājarāja-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Muḷḷi-nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
yum taṉ perun=teviyarāki Iṉpuṟa neṭituvāti Uḻiyuḷ ḷiṭaituṟai ṉāṭum tuṭar vaṉavelippaṭara vaṉavāciyum cuḷḷiccūḻmatiḷk koḷḷip pākkaiyum naṇṇaṟ
karumuraṇ mum pe tavacai cāta keḻil muṭiyum muṉṉavaṉpak kal teṉṉavaṉ vaicca cuntaramuṭiyum Intitiṉāramum teṇṭirai Īḻa maṇṭala muḻuvatum Eṟipaṭaikkeraḷaṉ
muṟaimaiyiṟ cūṭuṅ kulataṉamākiya palar pukaḻ muṭiyum ce laittol peruṅkāvil palapaḻantivum ceruviṟ ciṉavil Irupattorukāl Araicu kaḷai kaṭṭa paracurāmaṉ melvaruñ cāntimattivaraṇ karuti Iruttiya cem
tiruttakumuṭiyum māpperuntaṇṭāṟ koṇṭa kopparakecaripan marāṉa śrī Irācentiracoḻatevarkku yāṇṭu 8Āvatu Irājarāja maṇṭalattu muḷḷināṭṭu brahmateyam śrī rājarā[ja*]caturrve timaṅ kalattu piṭākai Iḷaṅkokkuṭi tiru
ccālattuṟai Āḻvārkku coṇāṭṭu brahmateya lattūr Irukkum viyāpāri kaṇṇaṉ Irājarājaneṉ tirunoṉ tāviḷakku 1- ṟu
kkum Aṭṭuvatāyiṉe cāttaṉ muṭukkaṉe cāttaṉ muṭukkaṉ m cāttaṉ ceṉtil puṇaiyum Āka Āṭu Aim vacceṉ kaṇṇaṉ Irājarāja ṉeṉ .
Digital edition of SII 23.74 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
